query:
SELECT 
  w.name,
  a.weekStartDate,
  a.timeBlocks,
  a.confirmedAt
FROM workers w
JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%дјЉеЁњ%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC;

  a.timeBlocks,
  a.confirmedAt
